title: followup
content:
Open follow-ups for after this rev
                                                                                                              
  - CSD for GNOME: implement client-side decoration (titlebar with min/max/close buttons, drag-to-move, edge  
  resize). ~1-2 weeks.                                                          
  - Wire wp_fractional_scale_v1 into HiDpiService: fractional scale events currently log but don't propagate. 
  Pure quality, not correctness.                                                   
  - text-input-v3 for native Wayland IME: ~3-5 days.                                                          
  - Native libwayland clipboard via wl_data_device_manager: replace the wl-copy/wl-paste subprocesses. Pure
  architectural cleanup.
